modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with screen recording on Panopto in Windows

full_description_text:  
So, the user was trying to do a screen capture on Panopto while using Windows. They weren't sure how to get it to work. It seems like they need some help figuring out the steps. Just a bit of confusion on the process, I guess.
short_description: Issues with screen recording on Panopto in Windows
